spendingLimits.description: An array of spending limit summaries that match the specified filters.

nextToken.description: The token to retrieve the next page of results. This value is null when there are no more results to return.

spendingLimitArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the spending limit.

deviceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the quantum device associated with this spending limit.

timePeriod.description: The time period during which the spending limit is active.

startAt.description: The start date and time for the spending limit period, in epoch seconds.

endAt.description: The end date and time for the spending limit period, in epoch seconds.

spendingLimit.description: The maximum spending amount allowed for the device during the specified time period, in USD.

queuedSpend.description: The amount currently queued for spending on the device, in USD.

totalSpend.description: The total amount spent on the device so far during the current time period, in USD.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the spending limit was created, in epoch seconds.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the spending limit was last modified, in epoch seconds.

tags.description: The tags associated with the spending limit. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value.

jobArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Braket job.
The ARN of the Amazon Braket hybrid job created.

quantumTaskArn.description: The ARN of the quantum task created by the request.

spendingLimitArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created spending limit.

providerName.description: The name of the partner company for the device.

deviceCapabilities.description: Details about the capabilities of the device.

deviceQueueInfo.description: The number of quantum tasks and hybrid jobs currently queued on the device.

queueSize.description: The number of hybrid jobs or quantum tasks in the queue for a given device.

queuePriority.description: Optional. Specifies the priority of the queue. Quantum tasks in a priority queue are processed before the quantum tasks in a normal queue.

status.description: The status of the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

jobArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an IAM role that Amazon Braket can assume to perform tasks on behalf of a user. It can access user resources, run an Amazon Braket job container on behalf of user, and output results and other hybrid job details to the s3 buckets of a user.

failureReason.description: A description of the reason why an Amazon Braket hybrid job failed, if it failed.

jobName.description: The name of the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

hyperParameters.description: Algorithm-specific parameters used by an Amazon Braket hybrid job that influence the quality of the traiing job. The values are set with a map of JSON key:value pairs, where the key is the name of the hyperparameter and the value is the value of th hyperparameter.

inputDataConfig.description: A list of parameters that specify the name and type of input data and where it is located.

outputDataConfig.description: The path to the S3 location where hybrid job artifacts are stored and the encryption key used to store them there.

stoppingCondition.description: The user-defined criteria that specifies when to stop a running hybrid job.

checkpointConfig.description: Information about the output locations for hybrid job checkpoint data.

algorithmSpecification.description: Definition of the Amazon Braket hybrid job created. Provides information about the container image used, and the Python scripts used for training.

instanceConfig.description: The resource instances to use while running the hybrid job on Amazon Braket.

createdAt.description: The time at which the Amazon Braket hybrid job was created.

startedAt.description: The time at which the Amazon Braket hybrid job was started.

endedAt.description: The time at which the Amazon Braket hybrid job ended.

billableDuration.description: The billable time for which the Amazon Braket hybrid job used to complete.

deviceConfig.description: The primary device used by the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

events.description: Details about the time and type of events occurred related to the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

tags.description: The tags associated with this hybrid job.

queueInfo.description: Queue information for the requested hybrid job. Only returned if QueueInfo is specified in the additionalAttributeNames" field in the GetJob API request.

associations.description: The list of Amazon Braket resources associated with the hybrid job.

channelName.description: A named input source that an Amazon Braket hybrid job can consume.

s3DataSource.description: Amazon S3 path of the input data used by the hybrid job.

s3Uri.description: Depending on the value specified for the S3DataType, identifies either a key name prefix or a manifest that locates the S3 data source.

failureReason.description: The reason that a quantum task failed.

deviceArn.description: The ARN of the device the quantum task was run on.

deviceParameters.description: The parameters for the device on which the quantum task ran.

shots.description: The number of shots used in the quantum task.

outputS3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket where quantum task results are stored.

outputS3Directory.description: The folder in the S3 bucket where quantum task results are stored.

createdAt.description: The time at which the quantum task was created.

endedAt.description: The time at which the quantum task ended.

tags.description: The tags that belong to this quantum task.

jobArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Braket job associated with the quantum task.

queueInfo.description: Queue information for the requested quantum task. Only returned if QueueInfo is specified in the additionalAttributeNames" field in the GetQuantumTask API request.

associations.description: The list of Amazon Braket resources associated with the quantum task.

numSuccessfulShots.description: The number of successful shots for the quantum task. This is available after a successfully completed quantum task.

actionMetadata.description: Metadata about the action performed by the quantum task, including information about the type of action and program counts.

experimentalCapabilities.description: Enabled experimental capabilities for the quantum task, if any.

type.description: The association type for the specified Amazon Braket resource arn.

tags.description: Displays the key, value pairs of tags associated with this resource.

devices.description: An array of DeviceSummary objects for devices that match the specified filter values.

nextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results, or null if there are no additional results. Use the token value in a subsequent request to continue search where the previous request ended.

jobs.description: An array of JobSummary objects for devices that match the specified filter values.

nextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results, or null if there are no additional results. Use the token value in a subsequent request to continue search where the previous request ended.

status.description: The status of the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

jobArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

jobName.description: The name of the Amazon Braket hybrid job.

device.description: The primary device used by an Amazon Braket hybrid job.

createdAt.description: The time at which the Amazon Braket hybrid job was created.

startedAt.description: The time at which the Amazon Braket hybrid job was started.

endedAt.description: The time at which the Amazon Braket hybrid job ended.

tags.description: Displays the key, value pairs of tags associated with this hybrid job.

quantumTasks.description: An array of QuantumTaskSummary objects for quantum tasks that match the specified filters.

nextToken.description: A token used for pagination of results, or null if there are no additional results. Use the token value in a subsequent request to continue search where the previous request ended.

deviceArn.description: The ARN of the device the quantum task ran on.

shots.description: The shots used for the quantum task.

outputS3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket where the quantum task result file is stored.

outputS3Directory.description: The folder in the S3 bucket where the quantum task result file is stored.

createdAt.description: The time at which the quantum task was created.

endedAt.description: The time at which the quantum task finished.

tags.description: Displays the key, value pairs of tags associated with this quantum task.
